title: Toggleable Offhand Placing (TOP)
description: Toggleable Offhand Placing, aka TOP, adds a new keybind that disables or enables the placing of blocks in your offhand, that way you can hold torches without accidentally placing them!
body:
TOP (Toggleable Offhand Placing) is a simple mod that stops you from accidentally placing blocks with your offhand. No more misplacing blocks while trying to eat, fight, or use tools. It keeps your offhand free for shields, food, or whatever else you need, without the frustration of random block placements. Just install it, and you're good to go. Its default keybind for toggling it is Y.  


Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
